name: The Shmoo
description: Shmoos are these creatures that just keep on multiply exponentially, consume nothing, and willingly provide everything humanity wants. They make these little bits [in blocks] and those atoms [in packages], and taste like pork if baked, chicken if boiled, and steak if fried.
